proposed_domain.name: cyc_extensions
proposed_domain.rationale: cyc_* tables are school-specific custom extensions spanning finance/ledger, leads, PTM, transport, hostel, scholarships, and exam grouping. They share the cyc_ prefix, mostly lack FK constraints, and depend on core domains (students, staff, fees, sessions) without replacing them. Recommend a single bounded context app after core domains are mapped — not before students/staff/fees baselines exist.
